## Checklist

<!-- Verify all items before submitting -->

### Code Quality

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have run `go fmt` on my code
- [ ] I have run `go vet` and addressed all issues
- [ ] I have run `golangci-lint` and fixed all critical issues

### Testing

- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have tested edge cases (empty input, nil values, large data, etc.)
- [ ] I have tested error paths
- [ ] I have added benchmarks for performance-critical changes

### Compatibility

- [ ] My changes are backwards compatible
- [ ] If breaking changes, I have documented migration path
- [ ] I have tested on multiple platforms (if applicable)
- [ ] I have tested with different AI tools (if applicable)

### Security

- [ ] I have considered security implications
- [ ] I have not introduced any security vulnerabilities
- [ ] I have not exposed any secrets or sensitive data
- [ ] I have validated all user inputs

### Dependencies

- [ ] I have not added new dependencies without discussion
- [ ] If dependencies added, they are necessary and well-maintained
- [ ] I have updated go.mod and go.sum

### Communication

- [ ] I am willing to respond to review feedback
- [ ] I will keep this PR up to date with the base branch
- [ ] I understand this PR may not be merged if it doesn't align with project goals
